DDDDLSRC.SOURCE:
@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE] @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED @EndUserText.label: 'Upload PO - Itens (Intf.)' define view entity ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP_I as select from zexed_up_pdcmp_i
association [1..1] to ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP as _File on $projection.FileUUID = _File.UUID
association [0..1] to I_ProductText as _MaterialText on $projection.Material = _MaterialText.Product and _MaterialText.Language = $session.system_language
association [0..1] to I_Plant as _Plant on $projection.Plant = _Plant.Plant
association [0..1] to I_AcctAssgmtDistrIndicatorTxt as _AcctAssgmtDistrIndicatorText on _AcctAssgmtDistrIndicatorText.Language = $session.system_language and $projection.MultipleAcctAssgmtDistribution = _AcctAssgmtDistrIndicatorText.MultipleAcctAssgmtDistribution
association to parent ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP_H as _Header on $projection.ParentUUID = _Header.UUID
composition [0..*] of ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP_A as _AccAssignment { key uuid as UUID, parent_uuid as ParentUUID, file_uuid as FileUUID, purchase_order as PurchaseOrder, item as Item, concat_with_space('Item:',ltrim( item, '0' ),1) as LabelItem, material as Material, _MaterialText.ProductName as MaterialName, plant as Plant, _Plant.PlantName as PlantName, document_currency as DocumentCurrency, purchase_order_quantity_unit as PurchaseOrderQuantityUnit, net_price_amount as NetPriceAmount, order_quantity as OrderQuantity, purchase_requisition as PurchaseRequisition, purchase_requisition_item as PurchaseRequisitionItem, base_unit as BaseUnit, multiple_acct_assgmt_distribut as MultipleAcctAssgmtDistribution, _AcctAssgmtDistrIndicatorText.DistributionKeyText as DistributionKeyText, account_assignment_category as AccountAssignmentCategory, tax_code as TaxCode, $session.system_language as Language, local_created_by as LocalCreatedBy, local_created_at as LocalCreatedAt, local_last_changed_by as LocalLastChangedBy, local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt, last_changed_at as LastChangedAt, //Associations _Header, _File, _AccAssignment } /*+[internal] { "BASEINFO": { "FROM": [ "I_ACCTASSGMTDISTRINDICATORTXT", "I_PLANT", "I_PRODUCTTEXT", "ZEXED_UP_PDCMP_I" ], "ASSOCIATED": [ "ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP", "ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP_A", "ZEXED_I_UP_PDCMP_H" ], "BASE": [], "ANNO_REF": [], "SCALAR_FUNCTION": [], "VERSION":0, "ANNOREF_EVALUATION_ERROR":"" } }*/
